app.title: Travel Packer
app.localOnly: This app runs 100% locally on your device. We do not store or transmit your data to any databases.
app.shareCopied: Share link copied to clipboard! Send this to your travel partner.
app.shareClipboardFail: Clipboard unavailable — copy this share link manually:
app.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to completely delete all saved data, including your Wardrobe and Trip preferences? This cannot be undone.
app.generateError: Failed to generate plan. Please try again.
app.shareConfirmItems: Load shared trip data? This will replace your closet ({wardrobe} items) with {shared} shared items and overwrite your saved trip settings.
app.shareConfirmNoItems: Load shared trip data? This will overwrite your saved trip settings.
app.shareLoaded: Shared trip loaded successfully! Click Generate to view the packing list.
tripForm.title: Trip Details
tripForm.airlineLabel: Airline (optional — validates suitcase against carry-on limits)
suitcase.title: Suitcase Optimization
suitcase.carryOnExtraNote: Note: {airline} may charge extra for carry-on on basic fares.
scanner.creditCardGuide: Place a credit card on top of your suitcase, then tap Capture
scanner.tapCardEnds: Tap each end of the credit card (long edge)
scanner.tapLongSide: Tap each end of the suitcase — the longer side
scanner.tapShortSide: Tap each end of the suitcase — the shorter side
scanner.cameraDenied: Camera permission was denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings and try again.
scanner.noCamera: No camera found on this device. You can still enter dimensions manually.
scanner.cameraError: Camera error: {msg}. You can close this and enter dimensions manually.
packingList.title: Your Optimized List
packingList.categoryPlane: Worn on Travel Day (Not in Suitcase)
packingList.tsaAlert: TSA Security Alert: Your liquids bag exceeds the 1-Quart (~1000cm³) limit for carry-ons. You are currently at {volume}cm³. You must remove some liquids or check your bag.
packingList.foldRangerDesc: A military technique where you fold the clothes into a tight cylinder. This minimizes wrinkles and saves a massive amount of space.
packingList.foldKonmariDesc: Fold clothes into neat little rectangles that stand upright. This allows you to see everything in your suitcase at a glance without digging.
packingList.foldBundleDesc: Wrap clothing around a central core (like a packing cube of underwear) to prevent sharp creases. Essential for business trips.
packingList.foldShoesDesc: Your shoes contain valuable empty volume! Stuff your socks and small items inside them to reclaim that space.
itinerary.title: Itinerary & Forecast
capsule.title: Daily Outfit Combos
wardrobe.title: My Digital Closet
wardrobe.eveningLabel: Evening / dressy piece (used for formal & night-out days)
wardrobe.bulkPlaceholder: Paste your packing list here! e.g., '3 pairs of blue jeans, 5 black cotton shirts, 1 heavy wool jacket...'
wardrobe.empty: Your closet is empty. Add items above!
chart.title: Volume Distribution
error.title: Oops, something went wrong.
error.description: The application encountered a fatal error. We've saved the crash details locally.
suitcaseLayout.title: Suitcase Layout
suitcaseLayout.empty: No items packed yet — generate a packing list to see your suitcase layout
suitcaseLayout.dragHint: Drag cubes to rearrange — sizes are proportional to volume
